name: Streaming · Football score dashboard (Python desktop)
description: CustomTkinter desktop control surface for live football scores with MongoDB team data, OBS text exports, penalty workflows, and optional licensing hooks.
longDescription: Desktop-first control app for venue staff: increment and decrement scores per pitch, manage penalties, persist teams in MongoDB (including Atlas-compatible setups), export `.txt` files for OBS text sources, and run multiple independent instances. Includes dark-mode UI, notifications, PIN-protected admin views, encrypted environment handling, and PyInstaller packaging for distribution.
features: Penalty shootout logic with safeguards against accidental edits
Optional licensing subsystem hooks where enabled
highlights: Connects venue scorekeeping to OBS through simple text file exports
Cloud-friendly Mongo tier with local backup considerations
Polished CustomTkinter UX for high-pressure match days
challenges: Live sports tooling must stay responsive during concurrent updates and network hiccups to MongoDB.
solutions: Local caching patterns, edit locks where needed, and clear separation between admin and scoreboard views.
security: Encrypt sensitive `.env` material with documented cryptography helpers
Protect MongoDB connection strings; never publish them in public documentation or screenshots
PIN gates for destructive team management actions
